resources.name: Monash Emergency and Campus Security
resources.eligibility: Anyone facing immediate danger on a Monash campus or needing emergency routing.
resources.contact: On campus: 03 9905 3333 or 333 from a Monash phone. Off campus emergency: 000.
resources.safety_notes: Use immediately for danger, violence, medical emergency, or urgent campus safety risk.

resources.name: Lifeline Australia
resources.eligibility: Anyone in Australia who is overwhelmed, in crisis, or thinking about suicide.
resources.contact: Call 13 11 14, text 0477 13 11 14, or use Lifeline online chat.
resources.safety_notes: If life is in danger, call 000 first.

resources.name: Monash Counselling for Students
resources.contact: Book through Monash counselling appointments. Specialist sexual harm/family violence appointments: call University Health Services on (03) 9905 3175.
resources.hours: Appointments by service availability; after-hours support listed on the official page.
resources.safety_notes: Not a substitute for emergency services. For immediate danger call 000 or Monash Security.

resources.name: Beyond Blue Support Service
resources.eligibility: Anyone in Australia needing brief mental health counselling or support navigation.
resources.contact: Call 1300 22 4636 or chat online through Beyond Blue.
resources.safety_notes: Use for brief counselling and mental health support; use emergency services for immediate danger.

resources.name: Monash Student Academic Success
resources.contact: Use the official Student Academic Success page to speak to an adviser, explore Learn HQ resources, or find workshops.
resources.hours: Online resources available anytime; consultations and workshops by booking availability.
resources.safety_notes: Can help with study skills, assessment preparation and academic language, but cannot change grades.

resources.name: Monash Financial Assistance
resources.eligibility: Monash students seeking financial assistance, budgeting, grants, loans, or cost-of-living support.
resources.contact: Message Monash Connect, make an enquiry, or call +61 3 9902 6011 from the official Financial Assistance page.
resources.hours: Monash Connect availability varies; official page provides current enquiry channels.
resources.safety_notes: Never share bank passwords, card numbers, or one-time codes.

resources.name: Monash Accommodation and Housing Services
resources.eligibility: Monash students seeking accommodation or housing support.
resources.contact: Message Monash Connect, make an enquiry, or call +61 3 9902 6011 from the official Accommodation page.
resources.hours: Monash Connect availability varies; official page provides current enquiry channels.
resources.safety_notes: For unsafe housing or immediate danger, use emergency or crisis services first.

resources.name: Monash International Current Students
resources.contact: Message Monash Connect, make an enquiry, or call +61 3 9902 6011 from the official International Students page.
resources.hours: Monash Connect availability varies; official page provides current enquiry channels.
resources.safety_notes: For visa or immigration law questions, use official university guidance and qualified advisers.

resources.name: Monash Disability Support Services
resources.eligibility: Monash undergraduate and graduate students with visible or non-visible disabilities, medical conditions, mental health conditions, or caring responsibilities.
resources.contact: Register for assistance, make an online enquiry, or contact a staff member through the official DSS page.
resources.hours: Online registration and enquiry options available; appointments by service availability.
resources.safety_notes: Share supporting documents only through official Monash channels.

resources.name: Ask Izzy Service Finder
resources.category: Community food, housing and money help
resources.eligibility: Anyone in Australia looking for nearby support services.
resources.contact: Use Ask Izzy to search by need and location for food, housing, money help, counselling, legal help and everyday needs.
resources.hours: Online service finder available anytime; provider hours vary.
resources.safety_notes: Check the listed provider's current opening hours before travelling.

resources.name: Monash Careers and Employability
resources.eligibility: Monash students looking for career advice, jobs, internships, networking, leadership programs, or workforce preparation.
resources.contact: Use the official Careers page, Careers and Internships Studio, and Monash jobs board links.
resources.hours: Online resources available anytime; events and studio availability vary.
resources.safety_notes: Avoid sharing identity documents with unverified employers.

resources.name: Monash Connect
resources.eligibility: Current Monash students who are unsure which service to contact.
resources.contact: Message Monash Connect, make an enquiry, or call +61 3 9902 6011.
resources.hours: Official page provides current messaging, enquiry and phone channels.
resources.safety_notes: Use as a first routing point when the right support service is unclear.

resources.name: 1800RESPECT
resources.category: Domestic, family and sexual violence support
resources.eligibility: People impacted by domestic, family or sexual violence in Australia.
resources.contact: Call 1800 737 732, text 0458 737 732, chat online, or video call through 1800RESPECT.
resources.safety_notes: Call 000 if you are in danger.
